query:
SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.worker_id,
  w.name as worker_name,
  w.code as worker_code,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.method
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY ae.event_time;
